steps.command: set -euo pipefail && cd '/home/user/Analytics' && mkdir -p build/system-identification && PYTHONPATH=services/system-id-worker:services/platform_common:services/raw-writer python3 -m system_id_worker 'run' '--quick' '--targets' 'cpu' '--profiles' 'impulse,step,ramp' '--intensity-pct' '35' '--max-cpu-percent' '35' '--tenant-id' 'dgx-lab' '--host-id' 'SPARK1' '--agent-id' 'system-id-automation' '--host-url' 'http://192.168.10.101:8000' '--out' 'build/system-identification/spark1-20260607t073101z-report.json' '--batch-out' 'build/system-identification/spark1-20260607t073101z-batch.json' && curl -sS -X POST 'http://192.168.10.101:8801/v1/telemetry/batches' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary @'build/system-identification/spark1-20260607t073101z-batch.json'

set -euo pipefail && cd '/home/user/Analytics' && mkdir -p build/system-identification && PYTHONPATH=services/system-id-worker:services/platform_common:services/raw-writer python3 -m system_id_worker 'run' '--quick' '--targets' 'cpu' '--profiles' 'impulse,step,ramp' '--intensity-pct' '35' '--max-cpu-percent' '35' '--tenant-id' 'dgx-lab' '--host-id' 'SPARK2' '--agent-id' 'system-id-automation' '--host-url' 'http://192.168.10.101:8000' '--out' 'build/system-identification/spark2-20260607t073101z-report.json' '--batch-out' 'build/system-identification/spark2-20260607t073101z-batch.json' && curl -sS -X POST 'http://192.168.10.101:8801/v1/telemetry/batches' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary @'build/system-identification/spark2-20260607t073101z-batch.json'
